entries.title: P0.5 C-1 fix introduced a security regression: gated presets could be enqueued without work_id (PR #50 cursor review medium). Closed by fix branch fix/v1.39-preset-gate-bypass.
entries.source: PR #50 cursor automation review (medium); follow-up to V1.39 P0.5 C-1 fix
entries.note: Security: when preset declares gates, work_id is now REQUIRED; resolved from input.work_id OR seed.work_id; missing work_id fails closed with 422 preset_gates_failed. Regression test gated_preset_without_work_id_is_rejected added. Commit 3cc1601f on fix/v1.39-preset-gate-bypass.
entries.closure_note: Closed in fix branch fix/v1.39-preset-gate-bypass commit 3cc1601f. Gate-eval now resolves work_id from input OR seed; gated presets without work_id fail closed with 422 preset_gates_failed; regression test added.
